text:
The following is a list of episodes from the TV anime adaptation of the manga series Hunter × Hunter. The adaptation was produced by Nippon Animation and first aired on Fuji Television for 62 episodes from October 16, 1999, to March 31, 2001. The TV series is based only on the first 11 volumes of the manga, with subsequent story arcs produced as DVD OVA series. The series is directed by Kazuhiro Furuhashi, of Rurouni Kenshin fame.

As of August 2008, Viz Media has licensed the rights to the original 62 episode TV anime series, with the first box-set being released in December.

Trivia

The series possibly could have had an alternate original ending planned, but it was rejected.
The Japanese covers were illustrated by Masaaki Kangnang, who also illustrated some of the Hunter × Hunter merch from around the same time
